title: anthistiria ciliata var. syriaca
intro: Anthistiria ciliata var. syriaca, also known as Syrian hair-grass or Syrian feather-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is commonly found in the regions of Syria and Turkey, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthistiria ciliata var. syriaca include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and flowers.
